items.summary: Add a 'Waterworks Stunt Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Waterworks Stunt Show', a description highlighting jet skis, fire, blood-pumping action, and choreographed stunt fighting combat, a 'Coming 2027' year tag, and mark it as a non-haunt-season show.

Add a 'Dog Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Dog Show', a fun family-friendly description emphasizing interactive entertainment for the whole family, performing dogs, and a meet & greet / petting experience after the show, and a 'Coming 2029' year tag.

Add a 'Halfway to Horror Nights' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Halfway to Horror Nights', a description dedicated to the Horror Nights origin story — covering how the event came about, a showcase of masks used throughout the event's history, and its annual May timing.

Register the AI-generated jet ski banner image for Waterworks Stunt Show and the AI-generated atmospheric story banner image for Halfway to Horror Nights in frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts, mapping each show name to its corresponding asset path under frontend/public/assets/generated/.

Update frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSection.tsx to display the AI-generated banner images for Waterworks Stunt Show and Halfway to Horror Nights on their respective show cards, using the generatedImages map. Dog Show card should render without a custom generated image (use a placeholder or omit the image gracefully if no image is mapped).
